Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.runtime_stats_interval_id AS %1, r.start_time AS %2, r.end_time AS %3, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.comment) AS %4, DATEADD(second, DATEDIFF(second, r.start_time, r.end_time) / 2, r.start_time) AS %5, DATEADD(hour, DATEDIFF(hour, 0, DATEADD(second, DATEDIFF(second, r.start_time, r.end_time) / 2, r.start_time)), 0) AS %6, DATEADD(day, DATEDIFF(day, 0, DATEADD(second, DATEDIFF(second, r.start_time, r.end_time) / 2, r.start_time)), 0) AS %7, DATEADD(week, DATEDIFF(week, 0, DATEADD(second, DATEDIFF(second, r.start_time, r.end_time) / 2, r.start_time)), 0) AS %8, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, DATEADD(second, DATEDIFF(second, r.start_time, r.end_time) / 2, r.start_time)), 0) AS %9, 1010 AS %10 FROM sys.query_store_runtime_stats_interval r", asRuntimeStatsIntervalId, asStartTime, asEndTime, asComment, asTime, asHour, asDay, asWeek, asMonth, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: initialize
